title: Good: state_machine.py provides clean lifecycle enforcement
description:
src/lichen/state_machine.py is well-designed:
- Generic StateMachine class with explicit transition table validation
- @requires_state decorator for declarative state checks on methods
- Frozen dataclass prevents mutation bugs
- Clear error messages with context (name, expected, actual)
- Logging on transitions for debuggability

Worth defending against over-engineering criticism: the complexity is justified by preventing subtle lifecycle bugs in async code.
close_reason: Verified: state_machine.py implementation is sound. All features confirmed working: generic StateMachine with transition table validation, @requires_state decorator, frozen dataclass, clear error messages, and logging. Tests pass.
